title: Result Error Handling
description: Implement a function that reads a configuration file and parses it into a Config struct. Use Rust's Result type for proper error handling with custom error types.
requirements: Define a custom ConfigError enum with variants: IoError, ParseError, MissingField
Config struct must have fields: name (String), port (u16), debug (bool)
Use the ? operator for error propagation

few_shot_examples.prompt: Implement a function that converts a string to an integer with error handling.
Implement a custom error type for a validation function.
